participants: Priya Sharma (Head of Customer Success, Acme Corp)
transcript:
[00:02] Sarah Johnson: Congrats again on going live last week — 5 days ahead of schedule is genuinely impressive.
[00:14] Priya Sharma: It was a team effort. And honestly, the onboarding experience made it much easier than I expected.
[00:26] Sarah Johnson: I'm glad to hear that. How's adoption been in the first few weeks?
[00:34] Priya Sharma: Really good. We've got 24 of our 25 seats active. The one holdout is someone on leave. Everyone else is in there daily.
[00:48] Sarah Johnson: That's incredible adoption for month one. What's driving it?
[01:02] Priya Sharma: Honestly, the template library was a big deal. We had our CS workflows set up in the first week. My team stopped asking me when we were going to get back to normal — this became normal faster than I thought.
[01:20] Sarah Johnson: That's exactly the outcome we aim for. Any friction points I should know about?
[01:32] Priya Sharma: One minor thing — the reporting export format could be a bit more flexible. We needed to massage the data for our board deck. Not a dealbreaker, just a feature request.
[01:48] Sarah Johnson: I'll log that. We've got a product update in Q2 that might address it. I'll keep you posted.
[02:00] Priya Sharma: Great. And I wanted to say — I've already recommended you to two CS leaders I know. One at a SaaS company in Austin, one at a fintech in New York. I told them you're the reason we went live on time.
[02:18] Sarah Johnson: That genuinely means a lot. Thank you.
[02:24] Priya Sharma: I mean it. Good implementations are rare. We submitted a 9 NPS yesterday, by the way. I was going to give you a 10 but I'm superstitious about perfects.
[02:38] Sarah Johnson: I'll take a 9 from you over a 10 from anyone else. What would have made it a 10?
[02:48] Priya Sharma: The export thing, and maybe a little more proactive heads-up on the product roadmap. I like knowing what's coming so I can plan around it.
[02:59] Sarah Johnson: Completely fair. I'll set up a quarterly roadmap brief for you — first one in April.
[03:10] Priya Sharma: Perfect. We're really happy with where we are. The team talks about this as a success story internally.
[03:22] Sarah Johnson: That's wonderful to hear. I'm going to hold you to that recommendation when your friend in Austin is evaluating.
[03:30] Priya Sharma: Already have. She's expecting your outreach.
[03:38] Sarah Johnson: I'll send a note today. Thanks for everything, Priya. This has been one of the best onboardings I've run.
